zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Willoughby於大約1395年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，她的父親William Willoughby25歲，母親Lucy le Strange29歲。她於大約1415年與Thomas Skipwith結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1452年10月22日在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Willoughby was born about 1395, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, William Willoughby, was 25 and her mother, Lucy le Strange, was 29. She married Thomas Skipwith about 1415. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 22 October 1452, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Willoughby est née environ 1395, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William Willoughby, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lucy le Strange, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Skipwith environ 1415. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 22 octobre 1452, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Willoughby um 1395 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Willoughby 25 und ihre Mutter Lucy le Strange 29. Sie hat um 1415 Thomas Skipwith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 22. Oktober 1452 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Willoughby è nata il circa 1395 nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, William Willoughby, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lucy le Strange, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Skipwith circa 1415. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 22 ottobre 1452, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Willoughbyが約1395年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで生まれた時，父William Willoughbyは25歳，母Lucy le Strangeは29歳であった。約1415年にThomas Skipwithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1452年10月22日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Willoughby(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Willoughby(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy le Strange(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1415년 Thomas Skipwith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1452년 10월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Willoughby nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Willoughby, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lucy le Strange, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Skipwith aproximadamente 1415. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1452, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Willoughby родилась около 1395 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Willoughby было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy le Strange, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Skipwith около 1415 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 22 октября 1452 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Willoughby nació aproximadamente 1395, en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Willoughby, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lucy le Strange, tenía 29 años.
